description: Pre-declared descriptors for model forms. Source-locked only. Used to enforce predeclaration before any target scoring.

descriptors.name: Mean Ca coordination number
descriptors.extraction: From CIF: average coordination of Ca sites using standard Voronoi or distance cutoff (document cutoff)
descriptors.source_requirement: Primary CIF from COD or equivalent with structure quality flags
descriptors.notes: Core structural gate for Ca-bearing silicates. Must be predeclared with exact extraction algorithm before use in any predictor.

descriptors.name: Mean Ca–O distance
descriptors.extraction: Average of all Ca–O bond lengths in the coordination polyhedra
descriptors.notes: Paired with coordination. Thresholds (e.g. ≥2.53 Å) must be justified from source data before model form freeze.

descriptors.name: T-site polarizability proxy
descriptors.extraction: Cation field strength delta × charge balance factor for T-site occupants (Al, Si, etc.)
descriptors.source_requirement: CIF + standard ionic radii table (cite source)
descriptors.notes: Replaces ad-hoc Al/O terms. Must be versioned with the radii table used.

descriptors.name: Silicate unit connectivity class
descriptors.extraction: Topology classification from CIF (Q^n species or ring/chain classification)
descriptors.notes: Key for distinguishing melilite vs. non-melilite Ca3Si2O7 polymorphs.

descriptors.name: Heavy H2X2 trans-planar topology penalty
descriptors.extraction: For heavy-atom H2X2 rotors only: coefficient × clamp01((torsionMean - 150) / 30)^2 × antiPlanarRelease × heavyAtomFactor(central element). Allowed central elements and coefficient must be frozen before fresh-target lookup.
descriptors.source_requirement: Geometry and charge rules must be source-locked before lookup; descriptor may be calibrated only on already-exposed failed H-S-S-H / H-Se-Se-H trans-side rows before a fresh target is reserved.
descriptors.notes: Diagnostic repair candidate for the exposed trans-side topology failure. Does not count as validation until an unchanged post-redesign formula passes a fresh held-out rotor target.

descriptors.name: Peroxide anti-planar release term
descriptors.extraction: For H2O2-like rotors: clamp01((torsionMean - onset) / span) × clamp01(1 - stericDeviation) × clamp01(1 - cisCrowding), with release strength, onset, span, and torsion grid frozen before held-out target lookup.
descriptors.source_requirement: Geometry, charge rules, torsion grid, and pass/fail criteria must be source-locked before lookup; current H2O2 rows are already exposed diagnostic pressure and cannot count as fresh validation.
descriptors.notes: Diagnostic candidate for the weak peroxide nonlocal frontier. Any repair must be predeclared against a fresh held-out rotor target before it can count as evidence.

descriptors.name: Peroxide unreleased route mismatch
descriptors.extraction: For peroxide-like rotors: evaluate the existing family score with the torsion deviation left unreleased (effectiveTorsionRms = torsionRms and effectiveTorsionMax = torsionMax). Use the resulting penalty versus the reference only for conformer admissibility or route selection; never convert it to cm-1 or add it to an energy barrier.
descriptors.source_requirement: Reference geometry, torsion tolerance, family weights, geometry rules, and candidate grid must be frozen before fresh-target lookup. Existing H2O2 rows are exposed model-form pressure and can establish feasibility only.
descriptors.notes: Separates structural route discrimination from the anti-planar energy release channel. It introduces no coefficient: all weights and tolerances are inherited unchanged from the registered molecule model.

descriptors.name: Peroxide torsion route distance
descriptors.extraction: cyclicDifference(candidateTorsion, sourceDefinedReferenceTorsion, 360) / 45 degrees, clamped to [0,1]. The 45-degree denominator is the existing frozen peroxide torsion tolerance. The reference must be explicitly classified as a potential-energy equilibrium coordinate or a dynamical/vibrationally averaged coordinate.
descriptors.source_requirement: A source-defined torsion convention and construct classification must be locked before scoring. Candidate torsions must use the same atom order and angular convention.
descriptors.notes: Selection-only descriptor introduced after the dimethyl-peroxide mapping failure. It uses no charges, steric pseudo-atoms, family weights, fitted coefficients, or energy conversion.

descriptors.name: Peroxide equilibrium-relative crowding
descriptors.extraction: Let delta be the signed shortest angular displacement candidateTorsion - sourceDefinedReferenceTorsion in [-180,180). Compute clamp01(-delta / 60 degrees). Positive displacement is the release/non-crowding direction; negative displacement toward the compressed/cis side accumulates crowding over the existing 60-degree crowding span.
descriptors.source_requirement: A source-defined potential-energy equilibrium torsion and atom-order convention must be locked before evaluation. Direction must not be flipped after inspecting target energies.
descriptors.notes: Post-peroxyformic redesign candidate. It replaces absolute-angle cis crowding so an equilibrium near 0 degrees is not penalized by coordinate origin alone. H2O2, TBHP, and peroxyformic acid are exposed pressure cases only.

descriptors.name: Hydrazine-family N-N torsion penalty
descriptors.units: dimensionless penalty with inherited cm-1 scale comparator
descriptors.extraction: Use the existing hydrazine-cation two-ended N-N geometry builder, source-defined equilibrium torsion as reference, torsion tolerance 55 degrees, steric-clearance span 0.55 Å, cis crowding clamp01(stericDeviation × clamp01((55 - torsion)/55)), anti-planar release clamp01((torsion - 145)/35) × (1-stericDeviation) × (1-cisCrowding), and the frozen molecule-family weights from external-hydrazine-cation-torsion-benchmark.mjs.
descriptors.source_requirement: A source-defined neutral hydrazine equilibrium torsion and at least two same-construct internal-rotation barrier rows must be reserved and locked before scoring. The ethane-derived cm-1-per-penalty scale and all geometry constants remain unchanged.
descriptors.notes: Exact-topology transfer descriptor. Hydrazine cation is exposed calibration pressure; neutral hydrazine is eligible only if reserved before numerical barrier lookup. Do not apply unchanged to hydroxylamine or other N-O rotors.

descriptors.name: One-dimensional surface-height power spectral density
descriptors.extraction: Use a source-reported one-dimensional surface-height PSD under a declared scan direction, detrending/windowing convention, and spatial-frequency unit. Interpolate only within the measured frequency support; do not extrapolate.
descriptors.source_requirement: Primary measured profilometry or AFM PSD paired to the same surface and state as the BRDF measurement.
descriptors.notes: Conventional rough-surface descriptor. It characterizes spatial-frequency content beyond RMS roughness and must never be counted as substrate-specific support.

descriptors.name: Rayleigh-Rice angle-to-spatial-frequency mapping
descriptors.extraction: For in-plane reflection, f = abs(sin(theta_s) - sin(theta_i)) / wavelength, with all angles measured from the surface normal and the sign convention locked before scoring.
descriptors.source_requirement: Source-locked wavelength, incidence angle, scatter angles, and in-plane geometry for the measured BRDF.
descriptors.notes: Conventional first-order perturbation mapping. Valid only in the smooth-surface regime declared by the source/model contract.

descriptors.name: Rayleigh-Rice PSD-backed BRDF shape
descriptors.extraction: Evaluate PSD at the Rayleigh-Rice spatial frequency for each measured scatter angle and normalize both predicted PSD-backed values and measured BRDF values by their maxima over the frozen non-specular angular rows. Fresnel/polarization prefactors are omitted only for shape-only scoring at one wavelength, incidence, polarization, and material state.
descriptors.source_requirement: Paired measured PSD and BRDF rows for one surface with fixed wavelength, incidence, polarization, and material state; specular-core rows must be excluded by a predeclared angular mask.
descriptors.notes: Shape-only conventional comparator. It does not claim absolute BRDF magnitude, polarization transfer, multiple scattering, or deep-roughness validity.

descriptors.name: BRDF-derived one-dimensional surface PSD
descriptors.extraction: Use a source-reported PSDscatter curve converted from measured in-plane BRDF with the source-declared Rayleigh-Rice or Golden Rule factors, wavelength, incidence, polarization, refractive-index treatment, and angle-to-frequency convention. Preserve the reported spatial-frequency rows and exclude the source-defined instrument-signature region.
descriptors.source_requirement: Primary measured BRDF from the same surface and state as an independently measured profilometry, AFM, or interferometric PSD. The BRDF-to-PSD conversion must be explicit and must not use the independent topography PSD as a fitted input.
descriptors.notes: Frequency-domain conventional cross-measurement comparator. It may test whether independent topography and optical scatter encode the same surface-frequency shape, but it is not a raw-BRDF prediction and cannot count as substrate-specific support.

descriptors.name: Measured or calculated density
descriptors.extraction: Measured value preferred; calculated only when measured unavailable with full provenance
descriptors.source_requirement: Primary literature or database with citation and temperature
descriptors.notes: Always labelled as conventional control evidence. Never promoted as substrate-specific support.

descriptors.name: Lorentz-Lorenz molar refraction term
descriptors.notes: Primary conventional optical comparator. All substrate-inspired terms must be shown to add value over this baseline on held-out targets.

rules.predeclaration: Any new model form or predictor must declare the exact subset of descriptors from this registry (or an extension PR) before scoring any target.
rules.conventional_labelling: All entries with 'conventional': true must be reported as control comparators and never counted toward unification or substrate evidence.
rules.source_lock: No descriptor may be used in a scored prediction unless a primary source (CIF + optical + density) for the target has been pre-reserved and classified under these descriptors.
